cases.title: Out-of-window check-in rejected with code per testing-plan §3
preconditions: Event is InProgress with configured check-in window not containing fixed clock now
Participant has registration in Registered state with no prior check-in
Authenticated staff actor with check-in capability for the event
steps: Set fixed clock to a time outside checkinOpenAt..checkinCloseAt
Invoke checkinService.staffCheckin(eventId, { registrationId }, actorContext)
Inspect thrown error code and database state
cases.expected: Testing-plan §3 row satisfied: out-of-window check-in is rejected with stable error code CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED; no CheckinRecord persisted; registration remains Registered

cases.title: Staff check-in before check-in window opens is rejected at module boundary
preconditions: Event is InProgress with configured checkinOpenAt in the future relative to fixed clock now
Participant has registration in Registered state with no prior check-in
Authenticated OrganizerStaff or OrganizerAdmin with check-in capability
steps: Set fixed clock to a time strictly before checkinOpenAt
Invoke checkinService.staffCheckin(eventId, { registrationId }, actorContext) against real Postgres
Query checkin_records and registration state for the participant
cases.expected: Request fails with CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED; no CheckinRecord persisted; registration remains Registered

cases.title: Staff check-in after check-in window closes is rejected at module boundary
preconditions: Event is InProgress or Completed with checkinCloseAt in the past relative to fixed clock now
Participant has registration in Registered state with no prior check-in
Authenticated staff actor with check-in capability
steps: Set fixed clock to a time strictly after checkinCloseAt
Invoke checkinService.staffCheckin(eventId, { registrationId }, actorContext) against real Postgres
Verify database state for check-in and registration
cases.expected: Request fails with CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED; no CheckinRecord created; registration state unchanged (Registered)

cases.title: Out-of-window check-in attempt preserves Registered state without transition
preconditions: Registration in Registered state before check-in attempt
Fixed clock now outside checkinOpenAt..checkinCloseAt
No prior valid check-in on the registration
steps: Record beforeState as Registered from registration repository
Submit out-of-window check-in via checkinService
Read afterState from registration repository and count CheckinRecord rows
cases.expected: beforeState Registered, afterState Registered per state machine invalid-transition policy; validCheckin guard fails on window; no CheckedIn transition occurs

cases.title: POST /events/{eventId}/checkins returns HTTP 422 with CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED when window not open
preconditions: E2E fixture event InProgress with check-in window not containing current (or simulated) time
Registered participant with valid registrationId
Staff or admin JWT with scope for the event
Fresh Idempotency-Key header value
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/checkins with body { registrationId } while outside the configured window
Parse error envelope from response body
cases.expected: HTTP 422 with error.code CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED and user-safe message per error contract; no successful check-in payload returned

cases.title: POST /events/{eventId}/self-checkin returns HTTP 422 with CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED when outside window
preconditions: Event rule config enables participant self check-in
Event InProgress but current time is outside checkinOpenAt..checkinCloseAt
Authenticated participant JWT for a Registered registration with no prior check-in
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/self-checkin with participant Authorization bearer token
Inspect response status, error.code, and registration-status endpoint
cases.expected: HTTP 422 with error.code CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED; registration remains Registered; no checkinAt returned

cases.title: Flow A lifecycle blocks check-in step when outside configured window
preconditions: E2E Flow A fixture: event progressed through publish, open-registration, and participant Registered
Event started (InProgress) but fixed clock is outside check-in window
Participant or staff token from prior registration step
steps: Execute Flow A check-in step: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/self-checkin or staff checkins while window is closed
Attempt to proceed to feedback step
cases.expected: Check-in step fails with CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED; registration remains Registered; subsequent feedback step cannot proceed without valid check-in

cases.title: Participant denied staff check-in endpoint even when outside window
preconditions: Event InProgress with check-in window closed (now outside bounds)
Registered participant with valid registrationId
Authenticated JWT for participant only (no staff check-in capability)
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/checkins with participant JWT and body { registrationId } for own registration
cases.expected: HTTP 403 unauthorized per roles matrix; insufficient check-in capability; no CheckinRecord created regardless of window state

cases.title: OrganizerStaff denied check-in on event outside assigned scope when window closed
preconditions: Event InProgress with check-in window closed but event not assigned to staff actor
Registered participant on that event
Authenticated OrganizerStaff JWT without scope for eventId
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/checkins with staff JWT and valid registrationId while outside window
cases.expected: HTTP 403 or 404 per scope policy before or instead of window success; no CheckinRecord persisted; registration state unchanged

cases.title: Participant self check-in UI shows window-closed feedback when outside window
preconditions: Event with self check-in enabled
Current time outside configured check-in window
Participant logged in with Registered status for the event
steps: Navigate to event self check-in page
Attempt check-in action or observe disabled state and messaging
Confirm no success timestamp is displayed
cases.expected: UI communicates that check-in is unavailable (window closed or not yet open) with actionable messaging; participant remains not checked in

cases.title: Organizer staff check-in console blocks action when window is closed
preconditions: OrganizerStaff logged in with assigned event scope
Event InProgress but check-in window closed
Target participant in Registered state listed in console
steps: Open organizer check-in operations console for the event
Attempt staff check-in for a registered participant
Observe error or disabled control feedback
cases.expected: Console prevents successful check-in and surfaces window-closed policy to staff; participant row remains unchecked-in

cases.title: Check-in at checkinCloseAt boundary is rejected when window policy excludes close instant
preconditions: Event configured with known checkinOpenAt and checkinCloseAt
Fixed clock set exactly to checkinCloseAt
Registered participant with no prior check-in
steps: Submit staff or self check-in at the close boundary instant
Query CheckinRecord and registration state
cases.expected: Check-in rejected with CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED per configured close-boundary rule; registration stays Registered

cases.title: Check-in window validator rejects time before checkinOpenAt
preconditions: Configured checkinOpenAt and checkinCloseAt with openAt < closeAt
Fixed clock now set to a time strictly before checkinOpenAt
steps: Call assertCheckinWindowOpen (or equivalent isWithinCheckinWindow) with event config and now before open
cases.expected: Validator throws or returns failure with CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED; check-in processing is blocked per BR-10

cases.title: Check-in window validator rejects time after checkinCloseAt
preconditions: Configured checkinOpenAt and checkinCloseAt
Fixed clock now set to a time strictly after checkinCloseAt
steps: Call check-in window validator with now after close boundary
cases.expected: Validator fails with CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED, enforcing configured window rule for late check-in attempts

cases.title: Out-of-window rejection preserves Registered state for later attendance reconciliation
preconditions: Event InProgress with closed check-in window (now after checkinCloseAt)
Registered participant never checked in
Event completion workflow available in test harness
steps: Attempt and fail check-in outside window
Complete event and run attendance finalization
Inspect registration terminal state
cases.expected: Failed check-in leaves no valid CheckinRecord; after event completion participant without valid check-in is marked Absent per BR-12, not Attended

cases.title: Concurrent out-of-window check-in requests all fail without creating records
preconditions: Registered participant with no prior check-in
Check-in window closed (now outside bounds)
Two or more parallel check-in requests for the same registrationId
steps: Fire concurrent staffCheckin (or API POST) calls while window is closed
Count checkin_records rows and inspect registration state after all requests settle
cases.expected: All requests fail with CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED; zero CheckinRecord rows created; registration remains Registered

cases.title: Out-of-window check-in on non-Registered registration still rejected before state checks pass
preconditions: Event with check-in window currently open initially
Registration in Waitlisted or CancelledByUser state
Valid authenticated actor attempting check-in
steps: Advance clock to outside check-in window
POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/checkins for the ineligible registrationId
cases.expected: HTTP 422 with CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED when window validation runs; no CheckinRecord regardless of registration state eligibility

cases.title: CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED error includes window bounds in details for user action
preconditions: Event with known checkinOpenAt and checkinCloseAt
Out-of-window check-in attempt via API
steps: POST check-in endpoint outside window
Inspect error.error.details in response body
cases.expected: Error envelope includes code CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED, user-safe message, and details with checkinOpenAt and checkinCloseAt ISO timestamps per error-handling contract

cases.title: Failed out-of-window check-in does not partially write CheckinRecord or transition state
preconditions: Database transaction boundary for check-in module (validate window before persist)
Registered participant, window closed, no prior check-in
steps: Attempt out-of-window check-in that fails at window validation
Query checkin_records and registration in same database session
cases.expected: No orphaned CheckinRecord and no registration state change; transaction rolled back preserving invariants

cases.title: Idempotent retry after window-closed failure does not auto-succeed when window still closed
preconditions: Registered participant, check-in window closed
Fixed Idempotency-Key header value for check-in write endpoint
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/checkins with Idempotency-Key K; receive CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED failure
Repeat POST with same Idempotency-Key K while window remains closed
cases.expected: Both responses fail with CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED; no CheckinRecord created; time-window policy requires user action rather than blind retry success
